use_cases: User registration and login forms with animated label transitions
Search inputs with floating label hints
Contact forms requiring accessible label animations
Any text input field needing visual focus feedback
Dashboard or settings forms with minimalist design
ai_summary: A floating label text input component featuring smooth spring-based animations for the label transition. The label floats above the input when focused or filled, providing clear visual feedback. Built with motion/react for fluid animations and supports both controlled and uncontrolled modes with optional leading icons.
